description: This file contains business logic services related to asset health scoring, alerting, and timeline events within an asset management platform. It defines functions for computing health scores based on asset data, generating alerts, creating timeline events, and managing work order statuses. The module interacts with ORM models and handles core service operations to support asset health monitoring and incident tracking.

classes.name: Alert
classes.description: Represents an alert generated for asset health issues, including severity, status, and description.

classes.name: AlertSeverity
classes.description: Enumeration of alert severity levels such as CRITICAL, HIGH, MEDIUM, LOW.

classes.name: Asset
classes.description: Represents an asset with properties like installation date, last service date, and health score.

classes.name: Inspection
classes.description: Represents an inspection event with associated health score and timestamp.

classes.name: TimelineEvent
classes.description: Represents a timeline event for asset history, including event type, title, message, and associated references.

classes.name: TimelineEventType
classes.description: Enumeration of different timeline event types such as ALERT_RAISED, WORK_ORDER_STATUS_CHANGED.

classes.name: User
classes.description: Represents a user involved in asset or work order activities.

classes.name: WorkOrder
classes.description: Represents work orders assigned to assets, including status and timestamps.

classes.name: WorkOrderStatus
classes.description: Enumeration of work order statuses such as PENDING, IN_PROGRESS, DONE.

methods.name: AlertSeverity _severity_for_health(score: float)
methods.description: Determines alert severity based on health score.

methods.name: str _title_for_health(score: float)
methods.description: Generates a descriptive title based on health score.

methods.name: float compute_health_score_mvp(*, asset: Asset, latest_condition_rating: int)
methods.description: Calculates a simplified health score based on asset age, service date, and condition rating.

methods.name: Optional[Alert] ensure_auto_alert_for_asset_mvp( db: Session, *, asset: Asset, health_score: float )
methods.description: Creates or updates an auto-generated alert when asset health is below threshold (< 40).

methods.name: TimelineEvent create_timeline_event( db: Session, *, asset_id: int, event_type: TimelineEventType, title: str, message: Optional[str] = None, inspection_id: Optional[int] = None, alert_id: Optional[int] = None, work_order_id: Optional[int] = None, extra: Optional[dict] = None, )
methods.description: Creates and saves a new timeline event linked to an asset, inspection, alert, or work order.

methods.name: tuple[float,Optional[Alert]] recompute_asset_health_and_maybe_alert( db: Session, *, asset: Asset, actor: Optional[User], inspection: Optional[Inspection] = None, )
methods.description: Recalculates asset health based on inspections and existing data, and manages related alerts.

methods.name: None set_work_order_status( db: Session, *, work_order: WorkOrder, to_status: WorkOrderStatus, actor: Optional[User], note: Optional[str], )
methods.description: Updates the status of a work order and logs the change with a timeline event.

methods.name: list[TimelineEvent] get_recent_timeline_for_asset( db: Session, *, asset_id: int, limit: int = 50 )
methods.description: Fetches recent timeline events for a specified asset.

ctags.name: compute_health_score_mvp
ctags.pattern: /^def compute_health_score_mvp(*, asset: Asset, latest_condition_rating: int) -> float:$/

ctags.name: create_timeline_event
ctags.signature: ( db: Session, *, asset_id: int, event_type: TimelineEventType, title: str, message: Optional[str] = None, inspection_id: Optional[int] = None, alert_id: Optional[int] = None, work_order_id: Optional[int] = None, extra: Optional[dict] = None, )

ctags.name: ensure_auto_alert_for_asset_mvp
ctags.signature: ( db: Session, *, asset: Asset, health_score: float )

ctags.name: get_recent_timeline_for_asset
ctags.signature: ( db: Session, *, asset_id: int, limit: int = 50 )

ctags.name: recompute_asset_health_and_maybe_alert
ctags.signature: ( db: Session, *, asset: Asset, actor: Optional[User], inspection: Optional[Inspection] = None, )

ctags.name: set_work_order_status
ctags.signature: ( db: Session, *, work_order: WorkOrder, to_status: WorkOrderStatus, actor: Optional[User], note: Optional[str], )
